name: Bixby
title_tag: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Manage Your Business Information on Bixby with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

Bixby + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Bixby with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Bixby?

Bixby is a virtual assistant and voice-activated AI developed by Samsung. It is designed to help users interact with and control their Samsung devices, perform tasks, answer questions, and provide personalized assistance, making it a valuable tool for managing smart homes and mobile devices.

Why Bixby + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With Bixby, manage your business listings effectively to maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring accurate representation of your business.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Increase your business's visibility by adding it to Bixby through Synup, helping you expand your reach and allowing potential customers to discover you easily.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by consistently providing accurate information about your business on Bixby.
  • Customer Engagement: Actively view and respond to customer reviews on Bixby, demonstrating that you value customer feedback and are committed to meeting their needs.

How to integrate Bixby + Synup?

The Bixby integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Bixby integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Bixby logo to manage the Synup + Bixby integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: Bixby is Samsung’s native virtual assistant that supports voice commands.
